name: IRC_ACCESS_TOKENS
description: This table contains Access Codes for external candidates accessing their information.

columns.Name: ACCESS_TOKEN_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the token or access code. System generated value.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CONFIRMED_FLAG
columns.Comments: The flag field that identifies if the access code is for a confirmed candidate.

columns.Name: ACCESS_CODE
columns.Comments: Access code to validate that candidate owns e-mail address.

columns.Name: ACCESS_CODE_EXP_DATE
columns.Comments: Expiration date and time for the access code

columns.Name: TOKEN
columns.Comments: Encrypted verification token, stored to log that it has been used.

columns.Name: TOKEN_EXP_DATE
columns.Comments: Expiration date extracted from the token

columns.Name: EMAIL_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Candidate's email address for whom the access code was generated.

columns.Name: PHONE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Candidate's phone number for whom the Access Code was generated.

columns.Name: PROPOSED_CAND_NUM
columns.Comments: Proposed number to be used for the new candidate.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the candidate to whom Access Code refers.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_COUNT
columns.Comments: Counts the number of submissions made with the access code.

columns.Name: SOURCE_TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the source tracking information related to the Access Code.

columns.Name: URL_SHORT_CODE
columns.Comments: Short representation of the URL fragment found in TARGET column.

columns.Name: URL_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date and time of validity for the URL.

columns.Name: SIGNIN_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date and time of validity for the login attempt.

columns.Name: URL_EXP_DATE
columns.Comments: End date and time of validity for the URL.

columns.Name: TARGET
columns.Comments: Full URL fragment represented by the URL_SHORT_CODE.

columns.Name: CONSUMER_ATTRIBUTES
columns.Comments: Name and value pairs needed by the consumer of the Short URL.

columns.Name: CHALLENGE_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: Indicates what kind of challenge will be required for visitor to the URL.

columns.Name: CONSUMER
columns.Comments: Indicates which Consumer feature is using this URL.

columns.Name: SHORT_CODE
columns.Comments: The Short Code sent to the candidate for further verification.

columns.Name: SHORT_CODE_EXP_DATE
columns.Comments: Expiration date and time for the Short Code.

columns.Name: FAILED_VALIDATION_COUNT
columns.Comments: Counts the number of failed attempts at verifying the Short Code

columns.Name: FAILED_SIGNIN_COUNT
columns.Comments: Counts the number of failed attempts to login.

columns.Name: DEVICE
columns.Comments: An identifier for the browser associated to the row.

columns.Name: PERSISTENT_ACCESS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the row can be used to provide recurring access.

columns.Name: LAST_ACCESS_REAUTH_DATE
columns.Comments: The last date the user authenticated to the system for persisted access.

columns.Name: LAST_ACCESS_REFRESH_DATE
columns.Comments: The last date the user renewed their access to the system for persisted access.

columns.Name: PHONE_CHANNEL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the phone login uses WhatsApp or another communication channel

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

indexes.Columns: ACCESS_CODE, ACCESS_CODE_EXP_DATE, PERSON_ID, URL_SHORT_CODE, SHORT_CODE, SHORT_CODE_EXP_DATE
